englishDefinitions: To have more of something than you need and be able to give or use some extra.
To have extra time, money, energy, or resources available.
persianTranslation: مازاد داشتن / وقت یا پول اضافی داشتن
examples: I don't have any cash to spare right now.
If you have a few minutes to spare, could you help me?
We have some seats to spare, so your friend can come too.
